text: Architected microservices migration that reduced API latency by 67% for 2M daily users and cut infrastructure spend by 18% annually
Implemented modular React 18 component architecture with TypeScript strict mode, reducing bundle size by 28% and cutting feature development time from 5 days to 2
Built real-time analytics dashboard using React 18 and WebSockets, reducing data latency from 800ms to 120ms and supporting 25K concurrent users
Rebuilt CI/CD pipeline with parallel test shards and deployment guards, reducing release failures by 41% and cutting deployment time from 40 minutes to 6
Introduced typed API contracts, error budgets, and observability dashboards that dropped Sev-1 incidents from 9 to 2 per quarter
Designed and implemented distributed caching layer using Redis, reducing database load by 55% and improving p99 response time from 2.1s to 340ms
Collaborated with senior developers to optimize database queries using indexing and query rewrites, reducing average load times by 20% across the platform
Implemented unit and integration tests for critical payment components, increasing code coverage from 42% to 87% and catching 3 critical regressions before production
Containerized legacy monolith into 12 Docker services orchestrated with Kubernetes, enabling independent scaling and reducing compute costs by 30%
Developed GraphQL API layer replacing 6 REST endpoints, reducing average client payload size by 43% and eliminating over-fetching for mobile clients
Led migration from JavaScript to TypeScript across 80K-line codebase, reducing runtime errors by 35% and onboarding time for new engineers from 3 weeks to 1
Engineered auto-scaling solution on AWS using ECS and CloudWatch alarms, handling 10x traffic spikes during peak events with zero downtime
Resolved 40+ bugs and performance bottlenecks across legacy codebase in first 90 days, improving application stability score from 72% to 94%
Designed event-driven notification system using Kafka and consumer groups, processing 5M+ events daily with sub-100ms end-to-end delivery
Refactored authentication service to OAuth 2.0 with JWT tokens, eliminating session-storage bottleneck and reducing login latency by 60% at 500K daily active users
Built churn prediction model achieving 89% accuracy using XGBoost on 3M customer records, reducing annual attrition by 23% and saving $4M in retained revenue
Developed credit risk scoring model with 0.92 AUC-ROC using gradient boosting, improving on the existing 0.78 baseline and reducing loan default rate by 18%
Designed A/B testing framework in Python that evaluated 40+ product experiments simultaneously, driving a 12% lift in checkout conversion backed by statistical significance
Built fraud detection pipeline reducing false negatives by 40% using ensemble methods, preventing $12M in annual fraud losses without increasing false positive rate
Developed end-to-end customer segmentation model using K-means and RFM analysis across 8M users, enabling targeted campaigns that increased email CTR by 31%
Analyzed 10M+ transaction records using Python and SQL, identifying pricing inefficiencies that informed a strategy saving $2.3M in procurement costs
Partnered with product and engineering teams to build real-time recommendation engine, increasing average session duration by 18% and revenue per user by 9%
Deployed demand forecasting model using ARIMA and Prophet across 200 SKUs, reducing inventory overstock by 22% and stockouts by 17%
Created Tableau dashboards tracking 15 KPIs for C-suite, replacing manual weekly reports and saving the analytics team 12 hours per week
Conducted causal inference analysis using difference-in-differences methodology to measure true ROI of a $5M marketing campaign, revealing 34% higher lift than initially reported
Led cross-functional data science team developing marketing mix models, improving marketing spend efficiency by 20% and increasing media ROI by $3.5M annually
Built NLP sentiment analysis pipeline on 500K customer reviews using BERT fine-tuning, achieving 91% accuracy and surfacing actionable product insights adopted by 3 teams
Automated feature engineering pipeline using Featuretools, reducing feature creation time from 3 days to 4 hours and improving model F1 score by 8 points
Developed survival analysis model to predict customer lifetime value, enabling sales team to prioritize high-value accounts and increasing enterprise deal close rate by 14%
Built geospatial demand model integrating census and mobility data, optimizing delivery zone coverage and reducing average delivery time by 11 minutes
Fine-tuned Llama-2 70B model on domain-specific customer support data using LoRA, achieving 87% task accuracy while reducing inference cost by 60% versus GPT-4
Designed MLOps platform on AWS SageMaker automating model training, versioning, and deployment for 12 production models, cutting release cycle from 3 weeks to 2 days
Built real-time inference service using FastAPI and ONNX runtime, reducing model serving latency from 450ms to 35ms at 10K requests per second
Implemented RAG pipeline using LangChain and Pinecone over 500K internal documents, reducing customer support ticket resolution time by 40% through automated answer retrieval
Developed computer vision pipeline using YOLOv8 for real-time defect detection on manufacturing line, achieving 96% precision and eliminating $800K in annual waste
Engineered feature store using Feast and Redis, enabling consistent feature sharing across 8 ML models and eliminating 40% of duplicated feature computation
Built model monitoring system using Evidently and Grafana that auto-detects data drift and triggers retraining, reducing model degradation incidents by 75%
Trained transformer-based document classification model on 2M labeled samples, achieving 94% F1 score and automating 70% of manual document routing workflows
Optimized PyTorch training pipeline with mixed precision and gradient checkpointing, reducing GPU memory usage by 45% and cutting training time from 18 hours to 6
Deployed A/B testing infrastructure for ML models using Kubernetes canary deployments, enabling safe rollout of 20+ model updates with automatic rollback on performance degradation
Built speech-to-text pipeline using Whisper and speaker diarization, processing 10K hours of call recordings monthly to surface coaching insights that improved agent performance by 19%
Implemented RLHF fine-tuning pipeline for internal LLM, improving response relevance score from 6.2 to 8.7 out of 10 based on human evaluator ratings
Created end-to-end Airflow DAG for automated model retraining triggered by data drift, reducing manual ML engineer intervention from 8 hours per week to near zero
Built multimodal recommendation engine combining image embeddings and user behavior signals using two-tower architecture, lifting CTR by 22% in A/B test on 5M users
Developed knowledge graph-based entity linking system using Graph Neural Networks, improving information retrieval precision by 38% for enterprise search product
Defined and executed quarterly product roadmap that increased upsell revenue by $1.2M, prioritizing 3 high-impact features validated through 40+ customer interviews
Led cross-functional redesign of checkout flow with engineering and design, boosting conversion rate by 18% and generating $2.8M in incremental annual revenue
Launched new onboarding flow reducing time-to-value from 7 days to 2, increasing 30-day retention by 22% across 200K new users in first quarter post-launch
Drove 42% year-over-year user growth by shipping 6 core feature improvements informed by NPS surveys, session recordings, and cohort analysis
Led roadmap for internal analytics platform serving 500+ teams, increasing activation by 18% and retention by 11% through self-serve data tooling improvements
Aligned engineering, design, and sales on a 6-month platform migration that reduced customer churn by 9% and cut support tickets by 34%
Introduced sprint-based release cadence and OKR framework for 3 engineering teams, improving on-time delivery from 60% to 88% within two quarters
Owned end-to-end launch of mobile payments feature for 4M users, coordinating 8 teams across 3 time zones and delivering on schedule with 99.9% uptime in first month
Reduced average bug-to-resolution time from 14 days to 3 by implementing structured triage process and partnering with QA to establish severity SLAs
Spearheaded AI-powered search feature using semantic ranking, increasing search-to-purchase conversion by 26% and reducing zero-result searches from 18% to 4%
Managed $4M product budget across 3 teams, reallocating 20% of resources mid-year to high-ROI initiatives that contributed $900K in net new revenue
Conducted 60+ user interviews and 12 usability tests informing a full navigation redesign, reducing task completion time by 35% and cutting support escalations by 28%
Launched B2B self-serve tier reducing sales-assisted onboarding from 80% to 45% of new accounts, freeing sales team to focus on enterprise deals and increasing ACV by $400K
Delivered API product used by 200+ enterprise partners, maintaining 99.95% uptime SLA and growing API call volume 3x through improved developer documentation and SDKs
Defined and shipped accessibility roadmap achieving WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, expanding addressable market by an estimated 15% and fulfilling enterprise contract requirements
Designed and implemented scalable ETL pipeline using Apache Spark on Databricks processing 2TB of daily transaction data, reducing processing time from 6 hours to 45 minutes
Built real-time streaming data pipeline using Apache Kafka and Flink, ingesting 500K events per second from 200 IoT devices with sub-500ms end-to-end latency
Migrated on-premise data warehouse to Snowflake, reducing query execution time by 70% and cutting storage costs by $180K annually through intelligent clustering and compression
Developed dbt transformation layer with 120+ models and automated data quality tests, reducing data errors reaching production dashboards by 85%
Designed star schema data model for enterprise analytics platform supporting 300+ analysts, enabling self-serve reporting and eliminating 40% of ad hoc data requests to the team
Integrated cutting-edge data processing frameworks including Delta Lake and Apache Iceberg, improving data collection efficiency by 30% and enabling time-travel queries for compliance
Leveraged Python and SQL to analyze and clean over 1M records across 15 source systems, streamlining data operations and saving 15 engineering hours per week through automation
Implemented column-level data lineage tracking using OpenLineage and Marquez, reducing root-cause analysis time for data incidents from 4 hours to 20 minutes
Built metadata-driven ingestion framework that onboards new data sources in under 2 hours, down from 2 weeks, accelerating data product delivery for 8 business units
Orchestrated 80+ production Airflow DAGs with SLA monitoring and automatic alerting, achieving 99.7% pipeline reliability and reducing missed SLA events from 12 to 1 per month
Designed 12 interactive Tableau and Power BI dashboards adopted by 200+ business stakeholders, reducing time to insight from weekly reports to real-time and saving 25 analyst hours per week
Implemented row-level security and PII masking across the data platform using Apache Ranger, achieving SOC 2 Type II compliance for all data assets
Optimized Redshift cluster through workload management tuning and sort/distribution key redesign, cutting average query runtime by 65% for 500+ daily active BI users
Built CDC pipeline using Debezium and Kafka Connect to replicate transactional database changes to the data lake in near real-time, enabling fresh analytics with under 1-minute lag
Established data engineering best practices including code review standards, CI/CD for dbt models, and documentation requirements, onboarding 5 new engineers in under 2 weeks
